scripts.test:networking: node --test --test-name-pattern="^(real worker: join and snapshot flow|real worker: movement replication converges across clients|real worker: duplicate sockets are superseded cleanly|real worker: sniper fire without ads is rejected by the server|real worker: firing faster than cooldown only produces one authoritative hit|real worker: third player observer receives the same authoritative damage event|real worker: reconnecting within grace keeps one player identity alive|real worker: delayed inputs still converge without giant teleports|real worker: packet loss with delay still converges without repeated giant teleports|jump move shoot flow records hitmarker timing, server registrations, and reconciliation drift)$" tests/integration/real-worker-multiplayer.test.js tests/net/jump-move-shoot-flow.test.js
